scripts.spec:sync:backend: npm run spec:build && mkdir -p backend/src/main/resources/openapi && cp typespec/tsp-output/schema/openapi.yaml backend/src/main/resources/openapi/openapi.yaml
scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n spec,mock,web -c yellow,cyan,green "npm run spec:watch" "npm run mock" "npm run web:dev"
